title: Razorpay UPI authorization latency spike - India
customer_impact: 42% checkout payment failures for UPI users
actual_root_cause: Razorpay-side UPI processing degradation during bank switch routing
successful_fix: route high-value checkout traffic to Cashfree fallback
embedding_text: SEV-1 Indian ecommerce checkout UPI authorization timeouts Razorpay payment callback delay internal DB Redis healthy vendor-side UPI processing degradation fixed by routing traffic to Cashfree fallback

title: Razorpay UPI silent degradation - status page green
customer_impact: 38% payment failure rate across Mumbai and Bengaluru users
successful_fix: fail over UPI and card payments to Cashfree payment route
embedding_text: Razorpay India payment capture 504 latency spike status page green internal healthy acquiring bank route instability resolved by Cashfree failover

title: Cashfree payout webhook delay - Bengaluru merchants
customer_impact: delayed payout status updates for Bengaluru merchant dashboard
successful_fix: temporarily poll payout status API every 2 minutes
embedding_text: Cashfree payout webhook delay Bengaluru merchant dashboard stale internal queue healthy no DB errors vendor webhook delivery backlog fixed by polling payout status API

title: MSG91 OTP delivery drop - Delhi NCR and Jaipur
customer_impact: OTP login failures for Delhi NCR and Jaipur users
actual_root_cause: carrier routing issue on North India telecom routes
successful_fix: switch OTP traffic to Twilio India route for affected circles
embedding_text: MSG91 SMS OTP delivery drop Delhi NCR Jaipur DLT accepted no carrier errors internal queue healthy carrier routing issue switched to Twilio India route

title: AWS S3 Mumbai latency spike - ap-south-1
customer_impact: KYC image upload failures and slow asset loading
actual_root_cause: AWS S3 ap-south-1 elevated error rates
successful_fix: route uploads to Singapore backup bucket temporarily
embedding_text: AWS S3 Mumbai ap-south-1 latency spike PUT timeout GET slow KYC upload failures health dashboard delayed route uploads to Singapore backup bucket

title: WhatsApp Cloud API template delivery delay - India
customer_impact: order confirmation WhatsApp messages delayed 20-40 minutes
actual_root_cause: Meta template message processing queue backlog
successful_fix: send fallback SMS for paid orders and wait for Meta recovery
embedding_text: WhatsApp Cloud API India order confirmation delivery delay template messages backlog internal queue healthy Meta dashboard degraded fallback SMS for paid orders

title: Internal Postgres connection pool exhaustion - Mumbai cluster
customer_impact: checkout failure across UPI, cards, and COD
symptoms: high memory usage on DB pods
actual_root_cause: connection pool limit hit due to IPL sale traffic spike
successful_fix: increase pool size and restart DB pods
failed_checks: initially suspected Razorpay due to payment 504s
embedding_text: internal Postgres connection pool exhaustion Mumbai ap-south-1 checkout 504 all endpoints IPL sale traffic spike no vendor anomalies pool limit fixed by increasing pool and DB restart

title: Auth0 India login latency amplified by weak token cache
customer_impact: login failures for Indian users, 30% error rate
actual_root_cause: Auth0 degradation amplified by internal token cache misses
successful_fix: enable fallback token caching and reduce synchronous validation
embedding_text: Auth0 India token validation JWT timeout login 502 tenant degradation internal token cache miss spike mixed incident fixed by fallback token caching
